nodes.name: On new inbox row (called by Watcher)

parameters.query: UPDATE inbox SET status='processing', attempts=attempts+1, processed_at=now() WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM inbox WHERE (status='pending' AND attempts < 5) OR (status='processing' AND attempts < 5 AND processed_at < now() - interval '15 minutes') ORDER BY received_at ASC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED) RETURNING id, payload;

parameters.jsCode: const all=$input.all();if(!all.length||!all[0].json||!all[0].json.id){return [];}const item=all[0].json;let pl=item.payload;if(typeof pl==='string'){try{pl=JSON.parse(pl);}catch(e){pl={};}}pl=pl||{};const inbox_id=item.id||null;const account=pl.account||'UNKNOWN';const title=pl.title||('Call '+(pl.dedup_key||''));const dedup_key=pl.dedup_key||('call-'+inbox_id);const transcript=pl.transcript||'';const e=s=>String(s).replace(/'/g,"''");const ensureSql="WITH a AS (INSERT INTO accounts (name,last_verified) VALUES ('"+e(account)+"',now()) ON CONFLICT (name) DO UPDATE SET last_verified=now() RETURNING id) SELECT a.id AS account_id,(SELECT count(*) FROM projects p WHERE p.account_id=a.id) AS project_count FROM a;";const ctxSql="SELECT a.id AS account_id, a.name AS account, COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('id',p.id,'name',p.name,'value',p.sow_value,'status',p.sow_status)) FROM projects p WHERE p.account_id=a.id),'[]'::json) AS projects, a.feedback_summary FROM accounts a WHERE lower(a.name)=lower('"+e(account)+"');";return [{json:{account,title,dedup_key,transcript,ensureSql,ctxSql,inbox_id}}];

parameters.jsonBody: {"query":"query { boards(ids:[1126338886]){ items_page(limit:200){ items { id name group{ title } column_values(ids:[\"date\",\"date6\",\"sow_status\",\"status\"]){ id text } subitems { column_values(ids:[\"numbers\"]){ id text } } } } } }"}

parameters.query: SELECT key, content FROM tn_knowledge WHERE key IN ('signal_definitions','risk_framework','opportunity_framework','tone_of_voice');

parameters.jsCode:
const prep=$('Prep').first().json;const ctx=$('Read context').first().json;let projects=ctx.projects;if(typeof projects==='string'){try{projects=JSON.parse(projects);}catch(e){projects=[];}}projects=Array.isArray(projects)?projects:[];const titleL=(prep.title||'').toLowerCase();let proj=projects.find(p=>{const nm=(p.name||'').toLowerCase();if(!nm)return false;const tok=nm.split(/[^a-z0-9]+/).filter(w=>w.length>=3);return tok.some(w=>titleL.includes(w));})||null;const project_id=proj?proj.id:null;const projLine=proj?('IDENTIFIED PROJECT: '+proj.name):'IDENTIFIED PROJECT: (none matched - leave project null)';const lines=projects.length?projects.map(p=>'- '+p.name+(p.value?(' (GBP '+p.value+')'):'')+(p.status?(' ['+p.status+']'):'')).join('
'):'(no known projects yet)';const kn={};for(const it of $('Load TN knowledge').all()){kn[it.json.key]=it.json.content;}const lessons=(ctx.feedback_summary&&String(ctx.feedback_summary).trim())?('

[LESSONS FROM HUMAN FEEDBACK — apply these corrections to avoid repeating past mistakes]
'+ctx.feedback_summary):'';const systemMessage='You are the signal classifier for the Tecknuovo second brain. Apply the frameworks below.

[SIGNAL DEFINITIONS]
'+(kn.signal_definitions||'')+'

[RISK FRAMEWORK]
'+(kn.risk_framework||'')+'

[OPPORTUNITY FRAMEWORK]
'+(kn.opportunity_framework||'')+'

[TONE OF VOICE]
'+(kn.tone_of_voice||'')+'

Return ONLY JSON with a top-level signals array and a top-level budget_remaining field. Each signal has these fields: type (one of risk, opportunity, update, people), subtype, summary, quote, suggested_action, details. Score STRICTLY using the frameworks above. For a RISK, details has risk_category (one of the 14), likelihood (1 to 5) and impact (1 to 5). For an OPPORTUNITY, details has networks_total (the NETWORKS score out of 40). Otherwise details is empty. Do NOT include a confidence field; it is computed from your scores. budget_remaining is the remaining SOW budget in pounds as a plain number if the call states it (e.g. 300000), otherwise 0. PRECISION OVER RECALL: only surface MATERIAL signals a delivery or commercial lead would actually act on, and be conservative - when in doubt, leave it out. Do NOT raise a signal for routine cadence or stand-ups, general progress with no decision, client praise or thanks, scheduling, onboarding or kick-off admin, or simply confirming a SOW is approved or signed. Type definitions: RISK is a real threat to the SOW, delivery, compliance or reputation; OPPORTUNITY is a concrete chance for commercial action such as an extension, new work or scope growth, weighted by WHO said it (a budget holder or buyer counts far more than an administrator); PEOPLE is joiners, leavers, morale, SC clearance or capacity issues that need attention; UPDATE is ONLY a genuine milestone, go-live or decision, never routine progress. For EVERY risk and opportunity you MUST give a specific, useful suggested_action naming who does what next. For each opportunity score the 8 NETWORKS components and set networks_total out of 40 (never 0 for a genuine opportunity). A call may contain several material signals or none at all; ground each in an exact transcript quote.'+lessons;const user='ACCOUNT: '+prep.account+'
'+projLine+'
KNOWN PROJECTS / SOWs:
'+lines+'

CALL: '+prep.title+'
TRANSCRIPT:
'+prep.transcript;return [{json:{systemMessage,user,account:prep.account,title:prep.title,dedup_key:prep.dedup_key,transcript:prep.transcript,account_id:ctx.account_id,project_id}}];

const a=$('Assemble context').first().json;let parsed=$json.output;if(typeof parsed==='string'){parsed=parsed.replace(/```json/gi,'').replace(/```/g,'').trim();try{parsed=JSON.parse(parsed);}catch(e){parsed={signals:[]};}}if(!parsed||typeof parsed!=='object')parsed={signals:[]};if(!Array.isArray(parsed.signals))parsed.signals=[];const types=['opportunity','risk','update','people'];const SQ=String.fromCharCode(39);const q=s=>(s===null||s===undefined||s==='')?'NULL':SQ+String(s).split(SQ).join(SQ+SQ)+SQ;const sigs=parsed.signals.filter(s=>s&&types.includes(String(s.type||'').toLowerCase()));const rows=sigs.map(s=>{const t=String(s.type).toLowerCase();const d=(s.details&&typeof s.details==='object')?s.details:{};let conf='NULL';if(t==='risk'){const L=Number(d.likelihood)||0,I=Number(d.impact)||0,score=L*I;d.likelihood=L;d.impact=I;d.score=score;d.band=score>=20?'Critical':score>=12?'High':score>=8?'Medium':score>=4?'Low-Medium':'Low';if(score>0)conf=Math.round(score/25*100);}else if(t==='opportunity'){const nw=(d.networks&&typeof d.networks==='object')?d.networks:{};let total=0,any=false;['n','e','t','w','o','r','k','s'].forEach(k=>{const v=Number(nw[k]);if(nw[k]!==undefined&&!isNaN(v)){total+=v;any=true;}});if(!any&&d.networks_total!=null&&d.networks_total!==''){total=Number(d.networks_total)||0;any=true;}d.networks_total=total;d.band=total>=28?'High':total>=16?'Moderate':'Low';if(any)conf=Math.round(total/40*100);}return '('+q(t)+','+q(s.subtype)+','+q(s.summary)+','+q(s.quote)+','+q(s.suggested_action)+','+conf+','+q(JSON.stringify(d))+'::jsonb)';});const acctId=a.account_id?q(a.account_id):'NULL';const projId=a.project_id?q(a.project_id):'NULL';let sql;if(!rows.length){sql='SELECT '+SQ+'no signals'+SQ+' AS note;';}else{sql='WITH c AS (INSERT INTO calls (title,account_id,project_id,source,dedup_key,transcript,call_date) VALUES ('+q(a.title)+','+acctId+','+projId+','+q('teams')+','+q(a.dedup_key)+','+q(a.transcript)+',now()) RETURNING id) INSERT INTO signals (call_id,account_id,project_id,type,subtype,summary,quote,suggested_action,confidence,details) SELECT c.id,'+acctId+','+projId+',v.type,v.subtype,v.summary,v.quote,v.action,v.conf::numeric,v.details FROM c,(VALUES '+rows.join(',')+') AS v(type,subtype,summary,quote,action,conf,details);';}const br=(parsed&&parsed.budget_remaining!=null&&parsed.budget_remaining!=='')?Number(parsed.budget_remaining):0;if(br>0&&a.project_id){sql=sql+' UPDATE projects SET budget_remaining='+br+', last_verified=now() WHERE id='+SQ+a.project_id+SQ+';';}return [{json:{sql,signal_count:rows.length}}];

parameters.query: =UPDATE inbox SET status='done', processed_at=now() WHERE id = '{{ $('Prep').first().json.inbox_id }}';
